nasb.text: As for the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land and who returned and made all the congregation grumble against him by bringing out a bad report concerning the land,

esv.text: And the men whom Moses sent to spy out the land, who returned and made all the congregation grumble against him by bringing up a bad report about the land—

cnv.text: 摩西派去窺探那地的人回來，因為帶回有關那地的惡信，以致全體會眾都向摩西發怨言，

ccb.text: 摩西派去打探迦南的人回来以后危言耸听，以致会众向摩西发怨言。
